# Tables and figures

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{-2.5cm}
\noindent\hspace*{-1.8cm}%
\includegraphics[width=1.17\textwidth]{images/table_1_final.pdf}
\par
```

```{=latex}
\newpage
\vspace*{-1.5cm}
\noindent\hspace*{-1.6cm}%
\includegraphics[width=1.17\textwidth]{images/table_2_final.pdf}
\par
```

\newpage
\begin{landscape}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\vspace*{-0.8cm}

\noindent\hspace*{-0.8cm}%
\includegraphics[
  width=1.10\linewidth,
  height=0.80\textheight,
  keepaspectratio
]{images/figure_1_final.pdf}

\vfill
{\footnotesize Mikkel Errboe Steentoft \textbar\ 201609886 \hfill Page \thepage\ of 64}
\end{landscape}
\newpage
\begin{landscape}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\vspace*{-0.8cm}

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[
  width=1.10\linewidth,
  height=0.80\textheight,
  keepaspectratio
]{images/figure_2_final.pdf}
\end{center}

\vfill
{\footnotesize Mikkel Errboe Steentoft \textbar\ 201609886 \hfill Page \thepage\ of 64}
\end{landscape}
